resource.title: Local Leadership Grant
resource.description:
The Local Leadership Grant program provides $5,000 for resident-led community groups to help them inspire their neighbourhoods with events and activities that support the Toronto Strong Neighbourhoods Strategy. Projects must offer community-based activities related to at least one of the five domains of TSNS:

Economic Opportunities (e.g. job skills workshop),
Healthy Lives (e.g. wellness day),
Participation in Civic Decision-Making (e.g. community speak out event),
Physical Surroundings (e.g. community beautification event),
Social Development (e.g. neighbourhood festival),

requirements.eligibility: There is a range of eligibility criteria for this grant, a full list is available on the given link.
requirements.documents_required: Applicants must register for a Toronto Rebates, Incentives and Grants Portal (TGRIP) Account to apply for the Local Leadership Grant. Submissions will only be accepted through TGRIP.
